steps.title: Set up the calculation
steps.content: We need to find 20% of the total bill of $\$25.00$.

steps.title: Calculate the tip amount
steps.content:
Convert 20% to a decimal: $20\% = 0.20$.
Multiply by the total bill:
$$0.20 \times 25 = 5$$
The tip is $\$5.00$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
